title: hypericum cistifolium
intro: Hypericum cistifolium, also known as the rock rose or cistifolium St. John's wort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Hypericum genus. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and infections. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Hypericum cistifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
